records.m_Talk_ENG: Wow, it's my first time being downtown during Christmas.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Wow, it's my first time being downtown during Christmas.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Wow, it's my first time being downtown during Christmas.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Right? It was worth taking a day off from the bar.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Right? It was worth taking a day off from the bar.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Right? It was worth taking a day off from the bar.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The tree decorations are so pretty, and there seems to be more people out than usual.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The tree decorations are so pretty, and there seems to be more people out than usual.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The tree decorations are so pretty, and there seems to be more people out than usual.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Hmm?
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Hmm?
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Hmm?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I love you, babe.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I love you, babe.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I love you, babe.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Your hands are so warm.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Your hands are so warm.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Your hands are so warm.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The muffler you gave is also so warm.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The muffler you gave is also so warm.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The muffler you gave is also so warm.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Whoa...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Whoa...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Whoa...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Nicole, what are you staring at?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Nicole, what are you staring at?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Nicole, what are you staring at?

records.m_Talk_ENG: H-huh?! No, Momo! Cover your eyes!
records.m_Talk_DEU: H-huh?! No, Momo! Cover your eyes!
records.m_Talk_FRA: H-huh?! No, Momo! Cover your eyes!

records.m_Talk_ENG: H-how dare you! How dare you use your hands to seal my vision!
records.m_Talk_DEU: H-how dare you! How dare you use your hands to seal my vision!
records.m_Talk_FRA: H-how dare you! How dare you use your hands to seal my vision!

records.m_Talk_ENG: What's wrong?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What's wrong?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What's wrong?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Gremory, this place is dangerous. Couples are out in public casually showing affection like it's nothing.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Gremory, this place is dangerous. Couples are out in public casually showing affection like it's nothing.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Gremory, this place is dangerous. Couples are out in public casually showing affection like it's nothing.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...You mean couples holding hands and hugging each other?
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...You mean couples holding hands and hugging each other?
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...You mean couples holding hands and hugging each other?

records.m_Talk_ENG: You see it too, right? It's outrageous. If Momo sees it, it won't be good for her education.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You see it too, right? It's outrageous. If Momo sees it, it won't be good for her education.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You see it too, right? It's outrageous. If Momo sees it, it won't be good for her education.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Huh? Gremory...? Why are you suddenly hugging me...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Huh? Gremory...? Why are you suddenly hugging me...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Huh? Gremory...? Why are you suddenly hugging me...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: How is it? Isn't it warm to be so close together on a cold day like this? They're all close for the same reason, so don't worry about it.
records.m_Talk_DEU: How is it? Isn't it warm to be so close together on a cold day like this? They're all close for the same reason, so don't worry about it.
records.m_Talk_FRA: How is it? Isn't it warm to be so close together on a cold day like this? They're all close for the same reason, so don't worry about it.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Do... do you really think so? But then again, they did say this winter was going to be the coldest ever...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Do... do you really think so? But then again, they did say this winter was going to be the coldest ever...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Do... do you really think so? But then again, they did say this winter was going to be the coldest ever...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Subjects! If you two stick to me like that, I can't breathe.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Subjects! If you two stick to me like that, I can't breathe.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Subjects! If you two stick to me like that, I can't breathe.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh, look. That couple is about to kiss.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh, look. That couple is about to kiss.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh, look. That couple is about to kiss.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hyaagh, why, shamelessly, on such, a sacred day, would they, act so, on the streets...?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hyaagh, why, shamelessly, on such, a sacred day, would they, act so, on the streets...?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hyaagh, why, shamelessly, on such, a sacred day, would they, act so, on the streets...?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Are you so shocked that you lost the ability to speak?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Are you so shocked that you lost the ability to speak?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Are you so shocked that you lost the ability to speak?

records.m_Talk_ENG: But you've seen a lot of kissing in TV shows and comics, haven't you?
records.m_Talk_DEU: But you've seen a lot of kissing in TV shows and comics, haven't you?
records.m_Talk_FRA: But you've seen a lot of kissing in TV shows and comics, haven't you?

records.m_Talk_ENG: But those aren't in real life! And I don't think those two are even married!
records.m_Talk_DEU: But those aren't in real life! And I don't think those two are even married!
records.m_Talk_FRA: But those aren't in real life! And I don't think those two are even married!

records.m_Talk_ENG: But it's common to see people kissing in Christmas.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But it's common to see people kissing in Christmas.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But it's common to see people kissing in Christmas.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Should I call the cops on them for public indecency...?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Should I call the cops on them for public indecency...?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Should I call the cops on them for public indecency...?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's not like they're naked out in public, so you should get used to seeing it. Unless you want to be stuck working at the bar every holiday.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's not like they're naked out in public, so you should get used to seeing it. Unless you want to be stuck working at the bar every holiday.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's not like they're naked out in public, so you should get used to seeing it. Unless you want to be stuck working at the bar every holiday.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ngh... It's going to be difficult for me to get used to such blasphemous acts.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ngh... It's going to be difficult for me to get used to such blasphemous acts.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ngh... It's going to be difficult for me to get used to such blasphemous acts.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Anyway, shouldn't we hurry? The offline limited sales are starting soon.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Anyway, shouldn't we hurry? The offline limited sales are starting soon.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Anyway, shouldn't we hurry? The offline limited sales are starting soon.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If we're late, all we'll be doing is waiting in line and going home with nothing.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If we're late, all we'll be doing is waiting in line and going home with nothing.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If we're late, all we'll be doing is waiting in line and going home with nothing.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh! It's already opening time?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh! It's already opening time?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh! It's already opening time?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I can't miss out on a limited edition autographed copy of Nightmare Kiss's latest volume!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I can't miss out on a limited edition autographed copy of Nightmare Kiss's latest volume!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I can't miss out on a limited edition autographed copy of Nightmare Kiss's latest volume!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Momo! I'm going to run while carrying you on my back now! So hold on tight!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Momo! I'm going to run while carrying you on my back now! So hold on tight!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Momo! I'm going to run while carrying you on my back now! So hold on tight!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Will do!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Will do!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Will do!

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Guess teaching a clueless kid through comics wasn't such a good idea after all.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Guess teaching a clueless kid through comics wasn't such a good idea after all.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Guess teaching a clueless kid through comics wasn't such a good idea after all.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Phew! We were lucky they weren't all sold out.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Phew! We were lucky they weren't all sold out.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Phew! We were lucky they weren't all sold out.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yeah. We barely got it.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yeah. We barely got it.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yeah. We barely got it.

records.m_Talk_ENG: This volume was also touching. I think the author got a lot of inspiration from The Bridge of Seduction.
records.m_Talk_DEU: This volume was also touching. I think the author got a lot of inspiration from The Bridge of Seduction.
records.m_Talk_FRA: This volume was also touching. I think the author got a lot of inspiration from The Bridge of Seduction.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It came out today, and you've already finished it?
records.m_Talk_DEU: It came out today, and you've already finished it?
records.m_Talk_FRA: It came out today, and you've already finished it?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm a bit frustrated these days. Because I've already read every book worth reading.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm a bit frustrated these days. Because I've already read every book worth reading.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm a bit frustrated these days. Because I've already read every book worth reading.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then what is in those book bags you're carrying, Gremory?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Then what is in those book bags you're carrying, Gremory?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Then what is in those book bags you're carrying, Gremory?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh these? They're called light novels.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh these? They're called light novels.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh these? They're called light novels.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm not sure what those are, but being able to finish an entire genre and more! You really love to read, Gremory!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm not sure what those are, but being able to finish an entire genre and more! You really love to read, Gremory!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm not sure what those are, but being able to finish an entire genre and more! You really love to read, Gremory!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I know someone who likes these. And it's easier to get close if we have something in common.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I know someone who likes these. And it's easier to get close if we have something in common.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I know someone who likes these. And it's easier to get close if we have something in common.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Someone Gremory is interested in? I'm curious to know who this awesome person is!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Someone Gremory is interested in? I'm curious to know who this awesome person is!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Someone Gremory is interested in? I'm curious to know who this awesome person is!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'll introduce you soon.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'll introduce you soon.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'll introduce you soon.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh! Gremory! Nicole! I want to do that!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh! Gremory! Nicole! I want to do that!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh! Gremory! Nicole! I want to do that!

records.m_Talk_ENG: We're having a Christmas event! Throw darts at the spinning wheel and win a prize!
records.m_Talk_DEU: We're having a Christmas event! Throw darts at the spinning wheel and win a prize!
records.m_Talk_FRA: We're having a Christmas event! Throw darts at the spinning wheel and win a prize!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm, is it a movie promotion? I see a lot of staff wearing doll masks I'm not familiar with.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm, is it a movie promotion? I see a lot of staff wearing doll masks I'm not familiar with.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm, is it a movie promotion? I see a lot of staff wearing doll masks I'm not familiar with.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's from an animation series called the Town Soldiers of Bremen. It's what Momo's been interested in these days.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's from an animation series called the Town Soldiers of Bremen. It's what Momo's been interested in these days.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's from an animation series called the Town Soldiers of Bremen. It's what Momo's been interested in these days.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The first prize is... a General Franken plushy?
records.m_Talk_DEU: The first prize is... a General Franken plushy?
records.m_Talk_FRA: The first prize is... a General Franken plushy?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ugh, it's not alcohol?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ugh, it's not alcohol?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ugh, it's not alcohol?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ah hah hah...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ah hah hah...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ah hah hah...

records.m_Talk_ENG: The more subjects I have, the better! General Franken will assist me along with Huff Puff.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The more subjects I have, the better! General Franken will assist me along with Huff Puff.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The more subjects I have, the better! General Franken will assist me along with Huff Puff.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Okay. Should I go first?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Okay. Should I go first?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Okay. Should I go first?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Go forth, Nicole! Show them your power as one of my Four Champions and bring back loot!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Go forth, Nicole! Show them your power as one of my Four Champions and bring back loot!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Go forth, Nicole! Show them your power as one of my Four Champions and bring back loot!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Y-you got first place by hitting all three darts in the bullseye! Incredible!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Y-you got first place by hitting all three darts in the bullseye! Incredible!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Y-you got first place by hitting all three darts in the bullseye! Incredible!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Wow... How did she hit them all when the wheel is spinning so fast?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Wow... How did she hit them all when the wheel is spinning so fast?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Wow... How did she hit them all when the wheel is spinning so fast?

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's amazing. She got them all in that tiny area.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That's amazing. She got them all in that tiny area.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That's amazing. She got them all in that tiny area.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Did I get the first prize?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Did I get the first prize?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Did I get the first prize?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Of course! Here is a restaurant voucher for two! Congratulations!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Of course! Here is a restaurant voucher for two! Congratulations!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Of course! Here is a restaurant voucher for two! Congratulations!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Huh? But wasn't the first prize that bird plushy?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Huh? But wasn't the first prize that bird plushy?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Huh? But wasn't the first prize that bird plushy?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh, that's only for children who get first place.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh, that's only for children who get first place.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh, that's only for children who get first place.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's why I failed to get it. I'm sorry, Momo.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That's why I failed to get it. I'm sorry, Momo.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That's why I failed to get it. I'm sorry, Momo.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hmph! Not to worry, Nicole. I still have my chance.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hmph! Not to worry, Nicole. I still have my chance.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hmph! Not to worry, Nicole. I still have my chance.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Congratulations, little girl. Here is your hot pack as your prize for fifth place! Use it well!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Congratulations, little girl. Here is your hot pack as your prize for fifth place! Use it well!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Congratulations, little girl. Here is your hot pack as your prize for fifth place! Use it well!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Eck!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Eck!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Eck!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ah hah hah... It's unfortunate, but A for effort, I guess.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ah hah hah... It's unfortunate, but A for effort, I guess.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ah hah hah... It's unfortunate, but A for effort, I guess.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's okay. I'm just glad she didn't hit any of the staff with the darts.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's okay. I'm just glad she didn't hit any of the staff with the darts.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's okay. I'm just glad she didn't hit any of the staff with the darts.

records.m_Talk_ENG: N-no worries. I was aiming for fifth place.
records.m_Talk_DEU: N-no worries. I was aiming for fifth place.
records.m_Talk_FRA: N-no worries. I was aiming for fifth place.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I can get Huff Puff's comrades anytime, but my shivering subjects need this hot pack right away.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I can get Huff Puff's comrades anytime, but my shivering subjects need this hot pack right away.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I can get Huff Puff's comrades anytime, but my shivering subjects need this hot pack right away.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So be grateful for my gift, subjects.
records.m_Talk_DEU: So be grateful for my gift, subjects.
records.m_Talk_FRA: So be grateful for my gift, subjects.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hah hah... Thanks, Momo.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hah hah... Thanks, Momo.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hah hah... Thanks, Momo.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But I don't need a hot pack.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But I don't need a hot pack.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But I don't need a hot pack.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What? How dare you refuse my generosity...
records.m_Talk_DEU: What? How dare you refuse my generosity...
records.m_Talk_FRA: What? How dare you refuse my generosity...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Heek!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Heek!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Heek!

records.m_Talk_ENG: But you see, it's so much warmer and cozy to hug our little majesty like this.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But you see, it's so much warmer and cozy to hug our little majesty like this.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But you see, it's so much warmer and cozy to hug our little majesty like this.

records.m_Talk_ENG: How dare you treat a Demon Lord as a hot pack.
records.m_Talk_DEU: How dare you treat a Demon Lord as a hot pack.
records.m_Talk_FRA: How dare you treat a Demon Lord as a hot pack.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You also like my embrace, right, little majesty?
records.m_Talk_DEU: You also like my embrace, right, little majesty?
records.m_Talk_FRA: You also like my embrace, right, little majesty?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Mm... You're not wrong, so I'll let it slide this time.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Mm... You're not wrong, so I'll let it slide this time.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Mm... You're not wrong, so I'll let it slide this time.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Shall we go inside and have some hot cocoa?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Shall we go inside and have some hot cocoa?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Shall we go inside and have some hot cocoa?

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Yes!
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Yes!
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Yes!

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...Should I call the cops on them for public indecency...?!
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...Should I call the cops on them for public indecency...?!
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...Should I call the cops on them for public indecency...?!

root.m_Talk_ENG: It's not like they're naked out in public, so you should get used to seeing it. Unless you want to be stuck working at the bar every holiday.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It's not like they're naked out in public, so you should get used to seeing it. Unless you want to be stuck working at the bar every holiday.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It's not like they're naked out in public, so you should get used to seeing it. Unless you want to be stuck working at the bar every holiday.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ngh... It's going to be difficult for me to get used to such blasphemous acts.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Ngh... It's going to be difficult for me to get used to such blasphemous acts.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Ngh... It's going to be difficult for me to get used to such blasphemous acts.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Anyway, shouldn't we hurry? The offline limited sales are starting soon.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Anyway, shouldn't we hurry? The offline limited sales are starting soon.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Anyway, shouldn't we hurry? The offline limited sales are starting soon.

root.m_Talk_ENG: If we're late, all we'll be doing is waiting in line and going home with nothing.
root.m_Talk_DEU: If we're late, all we'll be doing is waiting in line and going home with nothing.
root.m_Talk_FRA: If we're late, all we'll be doing is waiting in line and going home with nothing.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Oh! It's already opening time?!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Oh! It's already opening time?!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Oh! It's already opening time?!

root.m_Talk_ENG: I can't miss out on a limited edition autographed copy of Nightmare Kiss's latest volume!
root.m_Talk_DEU: I can't miss out on a limited edition autographed copy of Nightmare Kiss's latest volume!
root.m_Talk_FRA: I can't miss out on a limited edition autographed copy of Nightmare Kiss's latest volume!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Momo! I'm going to run while carrying you on my back now! So hold on tight!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Momo! I'm going to run while carrying you on my back now! So hold on tight!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Momo! I'm going to run while carrying you on my back now! So hold on tight!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Will do!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Will do!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Will do!

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...Guess teaching a clueless kid through comics wasn't such a good idea after all.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...Guess teaching a clueless kid through comics wasn't such a good idea after all.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...Guess teaching a clueless kid through comics wasn't such a good idea after all.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Phew! We were lucky they weren't all sold out.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Phew! We were lucky they weren't all sold out.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Phew! We were lucky they weren't all sold out.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Yeah. We barely got it.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Yeah. We barely got it.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Yeah. We barely got it.

root.m_Talk_ENG: This volume was also touching. I think the author got a lot of inspiration from The Bridge of Seduction.
root.m_Talk_DEU: This volume was also touching. I think the author got a lot of inspiration from The Bridge of Seduction.
root.m_Talk_FRA: This volume was also touching. I think the author got a lot of inspiration from The Bridge of Seduction.

root.m_Talk_ENG: It came out today, and you've already finished it?
root.m_Talk_DEU: It came out today, and you've already finished it?
root.m_Talk_FRA: It came out today, and you've already finished it?

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'm a bit frustrated these days. Because I've already read every book worth reading.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'm a bit frustrated these days. Because I've already read every book worth reading.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'm a bit frustrated these days. Because I've already read every book worth reading.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Then what is in those book bags you're carrying, Gremory?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Then what is in those book bags you're carrying, Gremory?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Then what is in those book bags you're carrying, Gremory?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Oh these? They're called light novels.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Oh these? They're called light novels.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Oh these? They're called light novels.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'm not sure what those are, but being able to finish an entire genre and more! You really love to read, Gremory!
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'm not sure what those are, but being able to finish an entire genre and more! You really love to read, Gremory!
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'm not sure what those are, but being able to finish an entire genre and more! You really love to read, Gremory!

root.m_Talk_ENG: I know someone who likes these. And it's easier to get close if we have something in common.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I know someone who likes these. And it's easier to get close if we have something in common.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I know someone who likes these. And it's easier to get close if we have something in common.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Someone Gremory is interested in? I'm curious to know who this awesome person is!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Someone Gremory is interested in? I'm curious to know who this awesome person is!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Someone Gremory is interested in? I'm curious to know who this awesome person is!

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'll introduce you soon.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'll introduce you soon.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'll introduce you soon.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Oh! Gremory! Nicole! I want to do that!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Oh! Gremory! Nicole! I want to do that!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Oh! Gremory! Nicole! I want to do that!

root.m_Talk_ENG: We're having a Christmas event! Throw darts at the spinning wheel and win a prize!
root.m_Talk_DEU: We're having a Christmas event! Throw darts at the spinning wheel and win a prize!
root.m_Talk_FRA: We're having a Christmas event! Throw darts at the spinning wheel and win a prize!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm, is it a movie promotion? I see a lot of staff wearing doll masks I'm not familiar with.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm, is it a movie promotion? I see a lot of staff wearing doll masks I'm not familiar with.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm, is it a movie promotion? I see a lot of staff wearing doll masks I'm not familiar with.

root.m_Talk_ENG: It's from an animation series called the Town Soldiers of Bremen. It's what Momo's been interested in these days.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It's from an animation series called the Town Soldiers of Bremen. It's what Momo's been interested in these days.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It's from an animation series called the Town Soldiers of Bremen. It's what Momo's been interested in these days.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The first prize is... a General Franken plushy?
root.m_Talk_DEU: The first prize is... a General Franken plushy?
root.m_Talk_FRA: The first prize is... a General Franken plushy?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ugh, it's not alcohol?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Ugh, it's not alcohol?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Ugh, it's not alcohol?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ah hah hah...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Ah hah hah...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Ah hah hah...

root.m_Talk_ENG: The more subjects I have, the better! General Franken will assist me along with Huff Puff.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The more subjects I have, the better! General Franken will assist me along with Huff Puff.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The more subjects I have, the better! General Franken will assist me along with Huff Puff.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Okay. Should I go first?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Okay. Should I go first?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Okay. Should I go first?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Go forth, Nicole! Show them your power as one of my Four Champions and bring back loot!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Go forth, Nicole! Show them your power as one of my Four Champions and bring back loot!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Go forth, Nicole! Show them your power as one of my Four Champions and bring back loot!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Y-you got first place by hitting all three darts in the bullseye! Incredible!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Y-you got first place by hitting all three darts in the bullseye! Incredible!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Y-you got first place by hitting all three darts in the bullseye! Incredible!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Wow... How did she hit them all when the wheel is spinning so fast?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Wow... How did she hit them all when the wheel is spinning so fast?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Wow... How did she hit them all when the wheel is spinning so fast?

root.m_Talk_ENG: That's amazing. She got them all in that tiny area.
root.m_Talk_DEU: That's amazing. She got them all in that tiny area.
root.m_Talk_FRA: That's amazing. She got them all in that tiny area.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Did I get the first prize?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Did I get the first prize?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Did I get the first prize?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Of course! Here is a restaurant voucher for two! Congratulations!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Of course! Here is a restaurant voucher for two! Congratulations!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Of course! Here is a restaurant voucher for two! Congratulations!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Huh? But wasn't the first prize that bird plushy?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Huh? But wasn't the first prize that bird plushy?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Huh? But wasn't the first prize that bird plushy?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Oh, that's only for children who get first place.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Oh, that's only for children who get first place.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Oh, that's only for children who get first place.

root.m_Talk_ENG: That's why I failed to get it. I'm sorry, Momo.
root.m_Talk_DEU: That's why I failed to get it. I'm sorry, Momo.
root.m_Talk_FRA: That's why I failed to get it. I'm sorry, Momo.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hmph! Not to worry, Nicole. I still have my chance.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hmph! Not to worry, Nicole. I still have my chance.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hmph! Not to worry, Nicole. I still have my chance.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Congratulations, little girl. Here is your hot pack as your prize for fifth place! Use it well!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Congratulations, little girl. Here is your hot pack as your prize for fifth place! Use it well!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Congratulations, little girl. Here is your hot pack as your prize for fifth place! Use it well!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Eck!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Eck!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Eck!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ah hah hah... It's unfortunate, but A for effort, I guess.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Ah hah hah... It's unfortunate, but A for effort, I guess.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Ah hah hah... It's unfortunate, but A for effort, I guess.

root.m_Talk_ENG: It's okay. I'm just glad she didn't hit any of the staff with the darts.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It's okay. I'm just glad she didn't hit any of the staff with the darts.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It's okay. I'm just glad she didn't hit any of the staff with the darts.

root.m_Talk_ENG: N-no worries. I was aiming for fifth place.
root.m_Talk_DEU: N-no worries. I was aiming for fifth place.
root.m_Talk_FRA: N-no worries. I was aiming for fifth place.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I can get Huff Puff's comrades anytime, but my shivering subjects need this hot pack right away.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I can get Huff Puff's comrades anytime, but my shivering subjects need this hot pack right away.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I can get Huff Puff's comrades anytime, but my shivering subjects need this hot pack right away.

root.m_Talk_ENG: So be grateful for my gift, subjects.
root.m_Talk_DEU: So be grateful for my gift, subjects.
root.m_Talk_FRA: So be grateful for my gift, subjects.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hah hah... Thanks, Momo.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hah hah... Thanks, Momo.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hah hah... Thanks, Momo.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But I don't need a hot pack.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But I don't need a hot pack.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But I don't need a hot pack.

root.m_Talk_ENG: What? How dare you refuse my generosity...
root.m_Talk_DEU: What? How dare you refuse my generosity...
root.m_Talk_FRA: What? How dare you refuse my generosity...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Heek!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Heek!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Heek!

root.m_Talk_ENG: But you see, it's so much warmer and cozy to hug our little majesty like this.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But you see, it's so much warmer and cozy to hug our little majesty like this.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But you see, it's so much warmer and cozy to hug our little majesty like this.

root.m_Talk_ENG: How dare you treat a Demon Lord as a hot pack.
root.m_Talk_DEU: How dare you treat a Demon Lord as a hot pack.
root.m_Talk_FRA: How dare you treat a Demon Lord as a hot pack.

root.m_Talk_ENG: You also like my embrace, right, little majesty?
root.m_Talk_DEU: You also like my embrace, right, little majesty?
root.m_Talk_FRA: You also like my embrace, right, little majesty?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Mm... You're not wrong, so I'll let it slide this time.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Mm... You're not wrong, so I'll let it slide this time.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Mm... You're not wrong, so I'll let it slide this time.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Shall we go inside and have some hot cocoa?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Shall we go inside and have some hot cocoa?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Shall we go inside and have some hot cocoa?

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...Yes!
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...Yes!
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...Yes!
